title: God's Dwelling.
content:
God's said to dwell there, wheresoever He
    Puts down some prints of His high Majesty;
    As when to man He comes, and there doth place
    His Holy Spirit, or doth plant His Grace.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "God's Dwelling.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
